existing_features.title: Create a search interface that allows users to enter search queries and displays results from a search API
Apply a distinctive, creative visual design with a coherent color scheme, typography, and layout style that creates a unique branded search experience
Debug and fix the search functionality so that when users enter a search query and submit the form, the backend search endpoint is called and results are returned to the frontend
Ensure the frontend useSearch hook correctly calls the backend actor's search method and handles the response data structure
Modify the SearchInterface component to detect and render all URLs in search results as clickable anchor tags that open in the same tab (without target="_blank")
Ensure that clicking on a search result title or link navigates directly to the URL without opening in a new tab

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement backend integration with a search API to fetch and return search results
Verify that the backend HTTP outcalls to the DuckDuckGo API are properly configured with correct headers, query parameters, and response transformation
Make all URLs in search results clickable and open them in the same tab when clicked
